horoscope: The Moon spends the day in your communications sector, dear Aries, and your curiosity may lead you to interesting experiences. Your desire to communicate is strong, but the day requires patience. You'll probably accomplish more if you pace yourself and slow down a little, which comes more easily as the day advances. In fact, a new perspective on a matter can redirect you along a new path. The Sun shines its light on a responsibility or the structure of a project or plan, and it may be time to reconsider some details. This year, the Sun meets Saturn in your own sign early tomorrow, and it can serve as a reminder of your limits or the reality of a matter. Ideally, it motivates you to clean up an issue that you're better off leaving behind you. It's a little easier to see the negative side of things today, but eventually, you'll arrive at a balance and some clarity. Aim to meet your responsibilities, but watch for taking yourself too seriously. You are maturing in many ways with wise and practical Saturn in your sign, and today, your responsibilities and possibly the problem areas in your life are in the spotlight.

The Moon spends the day in your solar second house, dear Taurus, helping to steady your emotions. Even so, you might find that trying to get the timing right is a lesson in frustration early today, or you're quick to react. Today's transits encourage a focus on practical and physical needs, but people can be distracting, as they tend to be blunt or indelicate. As the day advances, the Sun is heading into alignment with Saturn, and this brings clarity and possibly reality in a stronger dose than you prefer. You may need to attend to a responsibility or obligation, such as giving support to someone. This can in fact be spiritually rewarding. Reminiscing about the past is possible, or something from the past that was left unresolved reappears and demands your attention.

You can more fully appreciate the cooperative and personal elements of your life today, dear Gemini, but there are potentially significant developments happening in your professional life now as well. Having a strong sense of the future and what you'd like to make of it can figure strongly, motivating you further. The Moon spends the day in your sign, and emotions are immediate. Watch for impatience and taking things very personally, particularly if there are pressures to meet a rule or obligation. Still, it's a good time to get in touch with your feelings. As the day advances, if you receive some advice now, or seek it, it's likely to be very helpful and mature, although not necessarily what you want to hear. You could find that an old obligation comes up now, likely involving a friend, or if you've been feeling alone or without an anchor socially, you can feel the need to make a change. For some, this is about a strategy or plan to work towards a long-term goals. Fortunately, your resolve to improve your life, particularly to add more structure and discipline, is building, and seeing things clearly now can help this further.

You may find a person, subject, or pastime that excites you or gives you a new perspective, dear Cancer. Learning or teaching something can be very rewarding today. Still, the Moon spends all day in your solar twelfth house, and it's a time of the lunar month to prioritize relaxing, renewing, and recharging if feasible. Even so, as the day advances, you're reminded of your goals and responsibilities. You can have a real sense that you need to tighten your belt, work a little harder, and make improvements, particularly with your work or duties. The spotlight is on your performance now, whether this attention is coming from within or the outside world.

Impulsiveness with money, resources, or relationships can be themes with today's transits, dear Leo. However, with this tendency kept in check, it's a good time to connect with your wishes and hopes. You might learn something new or appreciate aspects of others you previously overlooked. As the day progresses, it's a good time to reorient yourself. The Sun and Saturn are heading into alignment in your solar ninth house today, and you can feel a great need to make productive use of your time, especially on a mental level. You're in great shape for boosting your practical skills. Serious discussions are possible now. There can be a dose of reality to deal with, although it may take a bit of time before things are objectively clear.

With the Moon at the top of your solar chart all day, dear Virgo, it can be time to pay more attention to your responsibilities, both to yourself and others. Aim to be patient when it comes to following rules, and keep your goals in mind. As the day advances, an impending Sun-Saturn alignment can shine a light on problem areas, particularly in areas related to support, an intimate relationship, or a financial matter. Once beyond the exaggerated stage of your realizations, you're in a great position to accept or reject the reality of a project, endeavor, or relationship. Drawing boundaries may be appropriate. Seeing things for both their strengths and weaknesses helps you to make the right decisions.

The Moon's transit of your solar ninth house today can be spirited, dear Libra. With plenty to distract you early today, it's probably best to slow down when communicating. Give yourself some emotional space to sort out your thoughts. As the day advances, the Sun and Saturn head toward an alignment in your partnership sector, and you might feel the weight of responsibilities to others or the heaviness of a close relationship. If others demand too much of you, you may need to set some boundaries. You may find reasons to take stock of your commitments and debts to others — it's a good time to consider meeting someone halfway. Alternatively, you could feel a little let down if you don't have someone you can genuinely say is in your corner. Circumstances may reveal the less flattering side of others or even of yourself through partnership. While flaws can appear bigger than they objectively are, seeing them now can help with clarity. Decisions are easier when you can see people and situations for their strengths and weaknesses. You'll be in a good position to reassess your needs from your relationships once you've gotten beyond the exaggerated stage of realizations.

With the Moon in your solar eighth house all day, dear Scorpio, you tend to take things to heart. Flexibility brings rewards now, and while you can feel a little impatient, it's better to implement small, manageable changes. As the day advances, the Sun and Saturn head into alignment, and responsibilities to your work or your daily chores step into the spotlight. It can be a time to reassess projects, identify flaws or weak spots, and face reality, but give yourself some time to think things through. Aim to go forward with more confidence that you are in a realistic place. You may be able to see your priorities more clearly in light of the week's events, and if a new game plan is necessary, you're ready to make one.

Today can be good for learning more about yourself and the important people in your life, dear Sagittarius. It's easy to feel offended or frustrated, but tensions may be about a desire to improve. As the day advances, we head toward a meeting between the Sun and Saturn in your solar fifth house, inclining you to see or consider the more serious side of your relationships and projects. There could be a critique or new information that frames things differently, which leads to a new direction or a change in your game plan. Recommitting to a project or goal may be in order after you've taken some time to explore all your options. With Saturn, it's important to consider ways to simplify and streamline your life to improve it all around.

Today's Moon encourages you to focus on the little things and the loose ends in your life, dear Capricorn. Distractions can undermine productivity, especially if you're excited about a project or idea, and nervous energy is possible. However, you're motivated and, with extra effort to focus, you're in great shape. As the day advances, the Sun and Saturn approach alignment in your solar fourth house, and the need to get back on track is prominent. Reminders of your responsibilities to family or those close to you are likely to arise. With this transit, the Sun shines its light on Saturn's obligations, duties, and need for rules and structure. It makes sense to address pressures or tasks rather than put them off. Others may not be jumping to help you or to cooperate at the moment, but aim to take care of what you can independently if necessary. Positively, you can get a real push to get going or get organized, serious, and productive. And, you feel more self-reliant in the process.

There is an easy ability to express yourself and your feelings today, dear Aquarius. Someone or a love interest might introduce interesting experiences into your life. As the day advances, we head toward a meeting between the Sun and Saturn, and you can get serious about a matter. You might see a project or endeavor in an entirely new, and likely very realistic, light. There can be a deadline to meet, or you could be feeling the weight of your responsibilities. If you can tackle matters one at a time, step by step, you will likely sidestep the feeling of overwhelm and get closer to your goals. If you need to concentrate, try unplugging or otherwise tuning out distractions so that you can get to a satisfying point of progress. You might find out where you stand on a matter, and this helps clarify your next step.

With the Moon in your solar fourth house all day, dear Pisces, you're inclined to stick with familiar faces and places. If domestic demands interfere with your personal plans or feelings of independence, there can be some friction, but this can also be a time of creative inspiration. As the day advances, you may face a reality or a responsibility in your financial life. Handling events with maturity is the best strategy now. This yearly event has been happening in your sign in recent years, but this year, it's occurring in your resources sector. This transit tends to shine light on problem areas, in turn allowing you to see what you should do to improve and strengthen your life. Aim to take an honest look at a plan, project, or area of your life that has been holding you back. Keep in mind that most good, long-lasting programs are slow and steady ones.
